title: Universal Home Soothing Exfoliating Bath Mitt Shower Accessory - White
description:
The exfoliating gloves are reusable and are made from Spa Quality 100% Nylon. By using them you will make it easier for you blood to circulate by ridding your body of toxins that have settled on the skin. The elastic around the wrist allows you to stretch the opening wide enough to fit your hand through and then close around the wrist to prevent it from falling off. To prevent bacteria and mold from forming the gloves must be washed and dried on a regular basis. They are machine washable.
